case_title: TERI EVANS VS. IHSS ( IN HOME SUPPORTIVE CONSORTIUM OF SF, INC. O et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF EVANS, TERI ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY EVANS, TERI AS TO DEFENDANT IHSS ( IN HOME SUPPORTIVE CONSORTIUM OF SF, INC. O SANCHEZ, SUZANNA ( CASE WORKER ) DAVIS, TED MARTIN, JOSH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $75.00 SERVED AUG-22-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT IHSS ( IN HOME SUPPORTIVE CONSORTIUM OF SF, INC. O

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCES BY (3) DEFENDANTS WHO WERE PRESENT, EXCEPT DEFENDNAT SUZANNA SANCHEZ WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON THREE DEFENDANTS, EXCEPT DEFENDANT IHSS WHO WAS SERVED. DEFENDANT IHSS WAS REPRESENTED BY STEPHANIE CORAM--DIRECTOR OF PROGRAMS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
